description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gable roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, a small front yard with a path of stepping stones, and a visible entryway with large windows. The property extends to the rear with a spacious backyard, including a patio area, green lawn, and a detached structure that could serve as a guest house or studio. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, complemented by darker accents on the roof and garage. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a front garage, and a spacious backyard with a detached structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with stepping stones.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, backyard lawn, patio, and detached rear structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, and the detached building at the back of the lot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the full length of the house and backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, large sidelights, a small porch, and a paved path leading from the driveway.
